NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: The app uses your location to track your fishing trips and show the route.
NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: The app uses your location in the background while a trip is active.
NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: The app uses your location in the background while a trip is active.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The app uses access to your photo library so you can select pictures of your catches and attach them to your logbook. For example, you can add a picture of a sea trout you have caught.
NSCameraUsageDescription: The app uses the camera so you can take pictures of your catches directly and attach them to your logbook.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The app may use the microphone in connection with the camera for video recording.
